hero.title: Personalized Cosmetics With Artificial Intelligence
hero.subtitle: In-depth skin analysis from professional skin scanner data. Multi-agent AI system creates personalized cosmetic formulations for your skin zones.

analysis.title: AI Skin Analysis
analysis.description: Upload PDF files from professional skin scanners. AI automatically extracts and analyzes skin metrics including Sebum, Pore, Moisture, Pigmentation, Sensitivity and Acne.

recommendation.title: Smart Recommendations
recommendation.description: AI system recommends suitable commercial products and personalized skincare routines based on detailed analysis results.

mini_factory.title: Mini Factory
mini_factory.description: Create personalized cosmetic kit with custom formulations for T-Zone and U-Zone. Active ingredients are dispensed into the Core Base system.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: 4 simple steps to get your personalized cosmetics

step1.title: Upload PDF
step1.description: Upload PDF scan results from professional skin scanning device

step2.title: AI Agents Process
step2.description: Multi-agent AI system automatically extracts, analyzes and validates data

step3.title: Expert Validation
step3.description: Automated expert system checks formulation validity and safety

step4.title: Receive Kit
step4.description: Personalized cosmetic kit is created with optimized formulation for your skin

competitor.title: Competitor Comparison
competitor.subtitle: DermAI excels with professional data and personalized formulations

upload.title: AI Skin Analysis
upload.description: Upload PDF from skin scanner to start analysis
upload.demo_desc: No PDF file? Try with sample data

progress.title: AI Is Analyzing
progress.subtitle: Multi-agent system is processing your skin data
progress.extract_desc: AI is reading and analyzing skin parameters
progress.validate_desc: Cross-referencing with Kaggle Big Data database
progress.formulate_desc: Designing personalized formulation for each skin zone

dashboard.title: Analysis Results
dashboard.subtitle: Detailed analysis and personalized recommendations for your skin
dashboard.error_not_found: We could not find the skin analysis result with ID #{{id}}.
dashboard.overview_raw_data_desc: View detailed analysis of moisture, sebum, pore size, and acne conditions on your skin.
dashboard.overview_kit_desc: Discover the personalized cosmetic formulation tailored by AI specifically for your current skin condition.
dashboard.overview_products_desc: List of commercially available products on the market that best suit your skin.
dashboard.raw_data_desc: Skin metrics extracted from PDF and analyzed by AI
dashboard.commercial_desc: Most suitable products for your skin type
dashboard.kit_desc: Personalized formulation for each skin zone
dashboard.agents_desc: AI agents involved in the analysis process
dashboard.data_note: Data has been cross-referenced with Kaggle Big Data database containing over 500,000 skin analysis samples.

kit.core_base_message: The mini factory system will automatically dispense active ingredients into the Core Base to create the final product that best suits your skin.
kit.legal_text: All active ingredient concentrations are within permitted limits according to Vietnam Ministry of Health regulations and EU Cosmetics Regulation standards.
kit.tzone_explanation: The T-Zone (forehead, nose, chin) tends to produce more oil. Light gel formula helps control sebum and minimize pores.
kit.uzone_explanation: The U-Zone (cheeks, temples) is usually drier. Rich cream formula provides moisture and deep nourishment.

about.title: About DermAI
about.subtitle: Vietnam's first AI-powered personalized cosmetics platform
about.mission_desc: DermAI was created with the mission of bringing advanced AI technology into the cosmetics industry, helping everyone find skincare products that perfectly match their skin.
about.tech_desc: Using Multi-Agent AI architecture with 5 specialized agents, combined with Big Data from Kaggle and clinical research.
about.team_desc: Developed by a team of leading AI experts and dermatologists.
